title: PHP switch Statement
codeExample:
<?php
$grade = 'B';

switch ($grade) {
    case 'A':
        echo "Excellent!";
        break;
    case 'B':
        echo "Good job";
        break;
    case 'C':
        echo "Fair";
        break;
    case 'D':
    case 'F':
        echo "Needs improvement";
        break;
    default:
        echo "Invalid grade";
}
?>

quiz.question: What happens if you omit break in a case?
Does switch use loose or strict comparison?
